display_text: Cost: 460: Magic Wand provides instant burst healing and mana restoration based on stored charges. Gains a charge (max 20) whenever a visible enemy within 1200 range uses an ability. The active restores 15 health and mana per charge, making it a crucial reactive sustain and survival tool against spell-spamming enemies. Stats: CD: 15s, Max Charges: 20, Restore per Charge: 15 HP/MP.

display_text: Cost: 460: Provides a small stat boost of +3 to all attributes (Strength, Agility, Intelligence), adding minor health, mana, attack speed, and damage. This base profile makes it a valuable early-game slot-efficient purchase that builds from Magic Stick.

display_text: Cost: 460: Serves as a defensive and reactive support item in team fights, countering high-frequency spell combos. Its value scales with the number of enemy spells cast nearby, providing a crucial burst of HP and MP to turn fights or survive ganks initiated by spell-heavy lineups.
search_text: magic wand team fight, reactive item, counter magic damage, survive burst, anti-caster, defensive item, team fight sustain, clutch save, turn fight, Magic Wand

display_text: Cost: 460: Situational vs spell-spamming heroes or lineups that cast frequently in skirmishes (e.g., Bristleback, Batrider, Zeus). Highly effective in early-game lanes against aggressive spell usage, making it a core early purchase for most heroes.
